_comment: Documented reasons for repos the harness can't reach end-to-end. Used by aggregate-results.mjs when no per-repo JSON was written.

reasons.medusa-storefront: requires a running Medusa backend and NEXT_PUBLIC_MEDUSA_PUBLISHABLE_KEY — not provisioned in this harness run
reasons.taxonomy: next 13.3.2-canary dev server failed to load config under Node 22; contentlayer dev succeeded but next dev crashed
reasons.nextra-docs: monorepo's root `pnpm dev` builds every package but does not bind a dev server on :3000 within the 120 s timeout
